case_title: MATTHEW G. DAWES VS. EUROPEAN AUTO PLAZA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-03-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MATTHEW G. DAWES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EUROPEAN AUTO PLAZA IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAWES, MATTHEW G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EUROPEAN AUTO PLAZA $2,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $151.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,051.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $101.25) SERVED MAR-24-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT EUROPEAN AUTO PLAZA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY DAWES, MATTHEW G. AS TO DEFENDANT EUROPEAN AUTO PLAZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAWES, MATTHEW G. AS TO DEFENDANT EUROPEAN AUTO PLAZA
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-03-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MATTHEW G. DAWES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EUROPEAN AUTO PLAZA IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
